title: apium × longipedunculatum
intro: Apium × longipedunculatum, also known as a hybrid of celery and wild celery, is a plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Apium × longipedunculatum can be consumed in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, or used fresh in salads and cooking.
